title: Enchanted Frames
description: Do you need invisible frames? But their crafting and other things are a problem for you? Then just use this mod! It allows you to transform a frame into an invisible one just by using shift + right click
body:
Invisible frames are a useful tool for creating different decor. This mod allows you to turn ordinary frames into invisible ones and back again just by interacting with them.
The mod is fully Server Side and does not require installation on the client.

# In-game demonstration
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XHVie5vBfqk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Controls
Shift + right click -> make frame invisible </br>
left click (punch) -> make frame visible again
